violations.text: Food observed stored on the floor in the walk in cooler. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the can opener, can opener base, crates used for clean storage, sugar bin, portable fan, and mixer have an accumulation of food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/19/2025

The area outside the back of the building has an accumulation of leaf litter and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2025
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 07/25/2023
